title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Amazon India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Backend Developer Vacancy at Amazon India Advisory Limited - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Amazon India Advisory Limited has an exciting opening for a Backend Developer at our Nashik office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Amazon India Advisory Limited:
Amazon India Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in on-call rotation for production support
• Troubleshoot, debug, and resolve software defects and performance issues
• Collaborate with cross-functional teams including product, design, and QA
• Ensure code security and follow best practices for data protection
• Mentor junior developers and conduct knowledge-sharing sessions
• Optimize application performance and ensure high availability
• Deploy and manage applications on cloud platforms like AWS, Azure, or GCP

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in SQL
• Proficiency in REST APIs
• Proficiency in TypeScript
• Proficiency in JavaScript
• Proficiency in Microservices
• Proficiency in Agile/Scrum
• Proficiency in Python
• Proficiency in TensorFlow

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Professional development and training programs
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Nashik, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Amazon India Advisory Limited!
